canonicalRule: Use public sources as inspiration signals only. Do not copy private material, unlicensed code, upstream prose, schemas, trademarks, datasets, or branding. Rebuild as original SZL/A11oy artifacts with validation and claim-status labels.
copyingRule: pattern-only; no upstream code, prose, schemas, trademarks, private material, or unlicensed datasets copied
endorsementBoundary: Public-source observation does not imply endorsement, affiliation, partnership, UDS catalog acceptance, or Hugging Face approval.

sourceQueues.whyQueued: UDS, Zarf-adjacent, operator, policy, and compliance patterns relevant to Warhacker readiness.
Disconnected packaging and bundle verification patterns.
Model card, dataset card, Space, and generated showcase patterns.
Canonical owned ecosystem: a11oy, platform, amaru, sentra, rosie, uds-mesh, vsp-otel, vessels, agi-forecast, thesis/proof repos.
Public researcher profile cluster from user-provided screenshot; useful for eval, routing, and benchmark pattern inspiration only.
Public scientific/deep-learning pattern inspiration for benchmark and dataset cards.

patterns.name: Disconnected proof bundle
patterns.licenseCaveat: Open-source visibility does not grant permission to copy templates blindly; preserve licenses if copying is ever approved. Current use is pattern-only.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Original A11oy offline proof bundle containing MANIFEST.json, attestations, receipts, policy report, and tamper demo.

patterns.name: Operator intent contract
patterns.licenseCaveat: Concept only; no upstream CRDs, schemas, code, or prose copied without license review.
patterns.a11oyTransform: A11oy ActionContract with ingress, identity, evidence, policy, receipt sinks, replay bounds, and egress limits.

patterns.name: Typed policy exemption ledger
patterns.licenseCaveat: No upstream TypeScript, policy templates, schemas, or prose copied without license review.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Original A11oy ExemptionReceipt design with actor, scope, justification, policy hash, and revalidation deadline.

patterns.name: Generated diligence card
patterns.licenseCaveat: Do not copy third-party card prose or metadata; generate original SZL card from tracked source.
patterns.a11oyTransform: A11oy HF mirror as non-model diligence packet with source commit, provenance, payloads, receipts, and caveats.

patterns.name: Receipted eval dataset
patterns.licenseCaveat: Publish only SZL-generated receipts/results and licensed or pointer-only benchmark corpora.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Future a11oy-test-results dataset with benchmark-map, results JSONL, receipts JSONL, and MANIFEST.json.

patterns.name: Raw-point competition-math ledger
patterns.licenseCaveat: Do not redistribute problem text unless licensed; store source pointers and digests where required.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Original A11oy raw earned/possible ledger with failed attempts, retries, tool use, judge disagreement, and no benchmark-overclaim claim.

patterns.name: Claim-status scoreboard
patterns.licenseCaveat: Do not copy third-party badges/prose without license review; do not inflate public claims beyond evidence or imply external endorsement.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Original A11oy scoreboard of verified-runtime, release-payload, thesis-anchor, roadmap, and needs-upstream-ci statuses.

patterns.name: Formula gate matrix
patterns.licenseCaveat: Runtime gates are not blanket theorem proofs; do not copy external proofs/code without license review; cite exact proof status separately.
patterns.a11oyTransform: Original A11oy route matrix for problems/actions through FalsePosition, MadhavaBound, LiuHuiPi, SummationInvariant, AdversarialRobustness, QECLineage, and receipt substrate gates.
